title: Jiho Min
text:
I am Jiho Min, a South Korean-American middle school student who likes turning ideas into useful web apps. I build projects around education, sports, data, and everyday workflows, with a focus on practical products that people can actually use.
I am especially interested in technology, finance, economics, and translation. My work combines coding, product thinking, and clear communication across Korean and English.

View Projects Contact Me

title: Jiho Min
text:
Featured Projects


SentenceAnki
An effective sentence memorization web app that helps learners study English sentences through fill-in-the-blank practice, imports, review history, and local-first study data.
Role: Solo full-stack developer
Stack: TypeScript, React, Vite, Netlify Functions, Netlify Blobs, Supabase, IndexedDB, SQL.js, XLSX, Vitest

Live Demo GitHub



Seocho Middle School Soccer Club Website
A soccer club website built for Seocho Middle School, including team information, match schedules, player profiles, and performance statistics.
Role: Solo developer
Stack: Python, Streamlit, Pandas, Plotly

Live Demo GitHub

title: Jiho Min
text:
Beyond Code

I also contribute as a translator for international websites, helping make information easier to access across languages. I want this portfolio to show not only what I have built, but also how I learn: by exploring real problems, making useful tools, and improving each project after it ships.
